sources.name: Home Office
sources.dataset: Modern Slavery: National Referral Mechanism and Duty to Notify Statistics

metadata.methodology: NRM referrals from Home Office Modern Slavery statistics. All figures are potential victims; not all are confirmed through the NRM decision process. Exploitation type from Home Office annual statistics. Top nationalities from Home Office data. Conviction data from CPS.
knownIssues: The NRM captures only those who come to official attention — the true number of victims is considerably higher. Estimates of 100,000+ victims are based on Home Office research but have wide uncertainty intervals.
Post-2020 spike is partly attributable to increased county lines policing operations and better identification during COVID lockdowns.
Modern Slavery Act 2015 is the primary legislation; prosecutions remain low relative to estimated victim numbers.
